en.extract:
The black-faced dacnis (Dacnis lineata) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is commonly found typically in pairs throughout the Amazon rainforest.

The '''black-faced dacnis''' ('''''Dacnis lineata''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Thraupidae]]. It is commonly found typically in pairs throughout the [[Amazon rainforest]].
